title: Ocugen Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q1 2023 Earnings Summary. Key Business Developments: Gene Therapy Progress: Ocugen announced positive preliminary Phase I/II results for OCU400, its modifier gene therapy platform targeting retinitis pigmentosa and Leber congenital amaurosis. The company received FDA orphan drug designation for OCU410ST to treat ABCA4-associated retinopathies including Stargardt disease. Clinical Data Highlights: Management reported that 100% of treated eyes showed a stable or improved MLMT score trend and 71% of OCU400 treated eyes demonstrated a one or more lux level improvement. Strategic Refocus: The company is shifting emphasis toward gene therapies, moving away from broader biologics development. COVAXIN wind-down contributed to reduced R&D expenses. Vaccine Platform: Ocugen is pursuing nondilutive government funding for its inhaled vaccine candidates. Financial Position: Cash, equivalents, and investments: $76.7M (March 31, 2023). Net loss: $16.5M ($0.07 per share). Runway: Extends into Q1 2024. Near-term Goals: OCU400 Phase III initiation targeted for Q4 2023; OCU410 and OCU410ST INDs planned for current quarter.
